name: Slice Lattice Data
description: Reads a paginated slice of entries from a collection at a path in the user's lattice namespace. Works on vectors (returns elements), maps (returns {key, value} entries), and sets (returns elements). Supports offset (default 0) and limit (default 100) for pagination. Works on any path and namespace (e.g. 'w/events', 'g/my-agent/timeline', 'w/config'). Use covia:list first to check the type and count at a path. Returns {type, values: [...], count: <total>, offset: <n>}.

path.description: Path to the collection, e.g. 'w/events', 'g/my-agent/timeline', or 'w/config'.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return (default 100).

type.description: Collection type: Vector, Map, or Set

values.description: The entries in the requested range. For maps, each entry is {key, value}.

count.description: Total number of entries in the collection
